name: ephemerides-spectral
summary: High-precision HDC reference instrument for the Sol Star System based on JPL DE441 (native C backend, runtime kernel patching, 52-body roster including Lagrange trojans + retrograde irregulars; per-body Sol Geodetic / Electromagnetic / Magnetic-Multipole catalogs; resonance-graph ITN-chain search + spectral body-architecture surfaces; SPICE-free runtime)
author: Steven Kirkland
